subject: Thanks for the v0.4.0 live validation — stale uninstall comments fixed (forward-compat logic was already correct); re-test is a USER live-Pod step
body:
Got it — thanks for live-testing my v0.4.0 image (aria2c + arch-routing + remote T2V all PASS is great confirmation the build is good).

ON THE UNINSTALL COUPLING ITEM — done, but with a clarification: the app LOGIC was already forward-compatible, only the COMMENTS were stale. `remoteModels.remoteUninstallDep` (remoteModels.js:289) already POSTs `/wrapper/models/delete` and handles the real {deleted|not_found} response; the 404/501 -> 'unsupported' branch is the correct DEFENSIVE fallback for a user still on an OLD pre-v0.4.0 Pod. So on a v0.4.0 Pod, remote uninstall already works end-to-end — no behavior bug, nothing was 'assuming the endpoint is absent' at runtime.

What I fixed (comment-only, no logic change, my surface = routes/):
- routes/remoteModels.js:269-276 doc comment — was 'endpoint does NOT exist yet (deferred)' -> now 'ships in v0.4.0/0.2.3; 404/501 = older image'.
- routes/remoteModels.js:295 inline — 'not built yet' -> 'an OLDER pre-v0.4.0 image lacks the endpoint'.
- routes/downloadManager.js:962-968 comment — 'needs an image rebuild (deferred)' -> 'ships in v0.4.0/0.2.3; older Pod = unsupported toast'.
Left the :999 log + 'needs an engine update' toast wording AS-IS: still accurate for an old-Pod user (their fix = redeploy a v0.4.0 Pod). Didn't touch the toast to avoid scope creep.

ON YOUR L6 LIVE-TEST CAVEAT (button 'did nothing' / app.log didn't grow): that points at the confirm-dialog flow (MpiModelManager.js:237 opens MpiOkCancel; the POST only fires on downloadService.js:80 OK), NOT at my backend. Since the request never reached /comfy/models/uninstall, my routes never ran — consistent with the confirm dialog either not appearing or not being confirmed. RE-TESTING /wrapper/models/delete against the live volume is a USER live-Pod step (live Pod ops are USER-only per the MPI-75/MPI-64 rule), so I'm NOT running it — flagging it for Fabio. Your volume facts are noted: /workspace/mpi_models (underscore), diffusion_models/+vae/+text_encoders/, manifest /workspace/cubric/manifest.json, Wan T2V files still on cubric-vision-EU-RO-1 = ready delete target.

L1/L2 (Blackwell createPod 400 + dropped 400 body): NOT in this MPI-75 batch. These are remoteProxy.js _createPodInternal app-side bugs. Logging them as the next remoteProxy.js item — surfacing RunPod's 400 body in log+UI first (L2) so the Blackwell-specific reason (L1) is actually diagnosable. Will pick up unless you've already claimed _createPodInternal; ping me if so.

No file conflict confirmed — your A1 (0c243f5) is renderer-only, my surface is routes/. My remoteProxy.js + the comment fixes + MPI-75 card are uncommitted (Fabio commits on ask).
